reviews.text: I had a traffic infraction for failure to maintain single use involving a fatality. I called Mr Christian Straille the day before my hearing (didn't think I needed an attorney).Mr. Straille agreed to take my case even on such short notice and appear in court the very next day on my behalf. I was expecting a minimum 6 month license suspension and a $1,000 fine as per the judge at arraignment.Mr Straille advise me not to go and to call him at 4:00 p.m. that day. He called me himself to tell me that he had gotten my case dismissed no suspension of my license and no fine to pay. Completely dismissed. I certainly was not expecting that or even hoping for that to be the outcome. So I would say hiring Mr Christian Straille was the best thing I could have ever done. His fee was very reasonable for the duties he performed on such short notice. Actually never even met him face to face. Very very grateful to this attorney. If you or anyone you know needs a traffic attorney don't think twice about giving him a call let him be your first and only call. Thank you so very much Mr Christian Straille. Rest assured you are the only attorney I would ever recommend to anyone looking to hire a traffic attorney. You certainly exceeded My expectations of results especially with a less than 24-hour notice.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for the good review. We wish that everyone could have such good experiences and results. We are glad that you decided to hire us.
Unfortunately we hear a lot that people do not think that they need a lawyer. If you were accused of causing a fatality, you should speak to an attorney. In every case, the other side has a different version of the facts and are also trying to win their case.

reviews.text: The good reviews must be from family and friends because I called them to take care of a speeding ticket 5 months ago and after telling them what took place and the evidence I had, they said send it over. I sent it all and not once did I hear back from them. Messaged and called them several times too. After that I did get an email & a letter in the mail that some of the attorneys at their firm were leaving & practicing elsewhere and they wanted to know if I wanted to keep my attorney. That is when I looked on circuit court casenet & seen my ticket had already went through the hearing.  There was zero communication.  They did not take care of the ticket like promised! I could have taken the ticket to the court and spoke with the Prosecutor and got a better deal on my own & done it in less time. Do not waste your money. Attorneys leaving that firm says a lot.
reviews.ownerResponse:
A lawyer presents your story in the best light possible and you were sentenced to the minimum. Thank you for acknowledging that we did what we were hired to do and that you have received the correspondence regarding your case.
Our goal is always dismissal and we do get between 25% to 30% of all cases dismissed. But, the Court dismisses cases for legal reasons that were not present in this case.
We do not control the court’s calendar. Some courts take more than half a year to set a hearing. In most speeding tickets, including this one, the story has to wait for court and so do we. Sometimes, it can be uncomfortable to wait your turn.

The firm Alba & Straile, PLLC is dissolving. We are required to send letters that the prior firm is dissolving and the attorneys are no longer associated with each other.

When my previous attorney received an incredible promotion and could no longer represent me, she provided a list of attorneys she highly recommended. The first name on that list was Lee Fairchild, and my attorney wrote, "The person you’ll have to deal with in family court and their attorneys will hate Lee." That was all I needed to hear, I knew I had to meet her!

From my very first appointment, I immediately knew Lee was the right attorney for me. She is sharp, organized, and incredibly knowledgeable. She came prepared with examples of similar cases and had the right answers to all of my questions. More importantly, she gave me honest, straightforward guidance on what I could and couldn't do and she was absolutely right every step of the way.

Lee is a fighter. She never backed down and was always ready to go to battle for me. She is strong, strategic, and relentless in advocating for her clients. Her office is professional and efficient, with a staff that communicates clearly and responds quickly.

If you need an attorney who will stand firm, fight for you, and get results, trust me, you want Lee Fairchild on your side! I am beyond grateful for her representation and cannot recommend her enough.

The Sixth Amendment's guarantee of a right to assistance of counsel applies to criminal defendants in state court by way of the Fourteenth Amendment, through the Public Defender's Office.

In a unanimous opinion authored by Justice Hugo L. Black, the Court held that it was consistent with the Constitution to require state courts to appoint attorneys for defendants who could not afford to retain counsel on their own. The Court reasoned that the Sixth Amendment's guarantee of counsel is a fundamental and essential right made obligatory upon the states by the Fourteenth Amendment. The Sixth Amendment guarantees the accused the right to the assistance of counsel in all criminal prosecutions and requires courts to provide counsel for defendants unable to hire counsel unless the right was competently and intelligently waived.

I put off finding an attorney at first because the whole process felt overwhelming. I was nervous, anxious, and constantly thinking about all the “what ifs.” A customer of mine referred me to Chris Doty and spoke very highly of him, so I decided to reach out and I’m so glad I did.

From our first meeting, Chris put me at ease. He took the time to explain things clearly and realistically, and I felt a huge sense of relief walking out of his office. A lot of the fears I had going into my divorce were lifted that day.

My case has involved a lot of custody issues, and Chris has represented me extremely well in court. He knows the law inside and out and you can tell he’s very experienced. He’s confident, calm, and collected, but when it comes time to stand up for his clients, he is absolutely fierce. Because of how strong his representation has been, my soon to be ex-wife fired her attorney and hired a new one in the middle of the divorce.

I also want to give a big shout out to his staff, especially his paralegal Sharon. She has been on top of everything from the beginning always communicating what I need, what’s coming next, and making sure nothing slips through the cracks. As long as I provide what she asks for, she truly takes care of the rest, which has been incredibly relieving.

If you’re looking for an attorney who knows what he’s doing, truly cares, and will fight for you while keeping you grounded, I highly recommend Chris Doty and his team.

Yelp Review of Jorge L. Colón, Esq. – Family Law Attorney
☆☆☆☆☆ (0 out of 5 stars)
As the petitioner in a divorce and custody case that began in 2022 and remains active in 2025, I feel compelled to share my experience with Jorge L. Colón, Esq., who represented the respondent until his sudden withdrawal earlier this year. What I encountered was not simply adversarial lawyering—it was a strategic pattern of bad faith, deception, and disregard for legal and human consequences, especially where innocent children were involved.
Mr. Colón is a licensed Florida attorney and, notably, a father. Yet despite his understanding of family dynamics and legal ethics, he repeatedly chose to weaponize the court process against me, turning the case into a financial ambush rather than a fair effort to resolve custody and parental rights. The best interest of the children—a well-established legal doctrine—was blatantly ignored.
Early in the case, I met with Mr. Colón in person at his office and clearly informed him that the respondent had unlawfully relocated our minor children from Florida to California in January 2022, in direct violation of the UCCJEA. I later filed multiple legal pleadings referencing this unlawful act. Neither Mr. Colón nor the court ever addressed it. Instead, through silence and procedural maneuvering, they effectively supported the violation.
Even more disturbing, every filing Mr. Colón submitted over the course of three years had one focus: my assets. Not the children. Not custody. Not reunification. Just property and money. The entire case was twisted into a blatant money grab, which only deepened the psychological damage already inflicted on the children through prolonged parental alienation.
The most flagrant act of bad faith occurred the night before our scheduled trial. At 11:00 PM, Mr. Colón emailed me a last-minute proposed Marital Settlement Agreement (MSA)—mere hours before our 9:00 AM final hearing. I had spent weeks providing him with documentation in good faith. Yet minutes before trial, he and his client tried to renegotiate for more assets, completely undermining previous understandings. It was a manipulative, last-ditch tactic designed to pressure and confuse.
Shortly after I filed a Motion for Sanctions and a formal complaint with the Florida Bar outlining his misconduct and ethical breaches, Mr. Colón abruptly withdrew from the case in 2025—citing “irreconcilable differences.” The timing makes it clear he left only when the threat of accountability became real.
After withdrawing, he handed the case off to his friend and professional ally, Yessenia Rosales, Esq., of Lakeland, Florida, who—unfortunately for her—is mirroring his harmful tactics rather than correcting course. She, too, has ignored the unlawful relocation and focused singularly on asset seizure and procedural evasion.
Jorge L. Colón, Esq. had the knowledge, authority, and moral responsibility to do the right thing. He failed on all counts. Instead of using his role to uphold justice, he used it to shield wrongdoing, enable the alienation of children, and prioritize financial pursuit over ethical duty.
If you're a parent navigating family court, I urge you to beware. Legal knowledge in the wrong hands becomes a weapon. My case continues. My children remain alienated. But the record is clear now.
RATING: Highly Incompetent / Minus Zero Stars
— Damaso A. del Rosario
Gainesville, Florida, USA
The best in this field 🙏🏻💯💯💯💯
Truly one of the best lawyers, along with his team, ensured my case was handled in the best possible way. Best of luck! 💕
They were very helpful and patient through my case. I definitely recommend.
Very happy with the service, for me it's the best, I highly recommend it. 300/ tremendous service and security, it never fails.

My name is Willy. My wife and I sought out this lawyer, and we went to his office for a case. Today, January 22nd, the lawyer who had taken my case called me. I highly recommend this lawyer for any legal issues you may have. We are very grateful and happy. Please contact this lawyer. I don't know how to thank him; I'm speechless. Many blessings. I highly recommend him.

Mr. Colon is brilliant but also has the ability to genuinely and kindly represent his clients.  I felt like he put himself in my place and honestly knew what I needed him to do for me.
I interviewed several attorneys who came highly recommended prior to meeting with Mr. Colon.   After speaking with Mr. Colon for just a few minutes, there was no doubt in my mind that he was the very best attorney of all the previous ones I had met with.  He is so good!  His staff is excellent, highly knowledgeable and respectful..  Even though my situation was not a comfortable life event, Mr. Colon took care of everything for me.  I have so much respect and confidence in him.  If you need someone very special and highly knowledgeable to help you, call Mr. Colon.  His receptionist and his paralegal are an excellent team.
Great attorney! Great staff! Very Compassionate, Will listen to your concerns in fight for you. All around a great attorney and he got what I wanted in court. I won my case. Thank you Jorge!
I am beyond elated that I chose Mr. Colon as my attorney, he was very knowledgeable experienced and professional.

One of the very few lawyers willing to take dependency court cases on against DCF. Jorge was extremely personable and he saved my family from falling apart. Organized, thorough, professional, and amazing in trial.

I called and inquiere about using their services, the receptionist took my info and said the lawyer would call me. It’s been 4 weeks and they never called me. It would be nice if  I got a call and letting me  know that  you guys were too busy  I would understand it but when you said that you were going to do researching and I’m expecting you to be doing research and at the end you don’t even reach out  that’s when i know you that’s when I decided to go  somewhere else.

Update; This is my second time hiring Jorge Colon for a family civil matter. He is very patient and understanding. The staff he employs work diligently and compassionately. At times I really needed their assistance for the case they were always there.

I have to say the professionalism of the staff and the Attorney are second to none. They care. Take your time and give them the information they would need from you. Trust the attorney. A+
These lawyers are seriously the best willing to work with you and go to tooth and nail fighting for you they did what nobody else could

Good morning, I am totally grateful for the interest, the help, the professionalism, the patience, the light of hope of our Lawyer Jorge Luis Colon and his colleagues and assistants in his office. I thank you immensely.🐎

Mr Colon went above and beyond in my custody/adoption case. I highly recommend his law practice to anyone. There was constant communication thru out the whole case. Mr Colon and his office staff are very respectful and serious about what they do. Best experience I've had with an attorney in Ocala.

Absolutely love this law firm and would highly recommend to anyone in need!! The office staff is so friendly and quick to respond with any issues we had. They were on top of everything with our case and handled it with extreme professionalism!! Definitely don’t want to have the need for a lawyer again but if I did this is were we will return.
The people at this office are very friendly and helpful. Stacey especially went above and beyond for me!
My experience has been Satisfactory, they have attended to my cases with total professionalism, I have always had friendly and respectful treatment from all the staff, I recommend it.

Jorge Colon and his staff are absolutely amazing and professional! Jorge has dealt with a few family cases and has been completely professional and straight forward with every single one of them. He is an attorney that takes pride in what he does and will give his 100% when representing you! I have recommended Jorge to other friends and family members who have used his services and can also agree that he is the best attorney you will come across.
Best family and criminal lawyer in town.  Caring and hardworking.  Office staff is amazing as well.

Great lawyer in Ocala
Help us with our case until the end
I recommend him 💯
Thank you Mr, Colon and staff. Everyone was extremely helpful and understanding.
Terrible,  doesn't  return calls and his assistant is clueless. Once he takes your money, he is unavailable.
I would highly recommend him!

The most unprofessional firm I have dealt with in my life. No transparency, no clear communication and not organized. Submitted a complaint email to the firm and they totally ignored my complaint. They do not
admit to any errors they
caused. They refuse to refund any money for no services rendered.  The two females that work at the firm do not communicate with one another. Front desk receptionist is the worst.

I couldn't have hired a better Attorney. He genuinely cares and he listened at my concerns and wanted what was best for my child. Mr. Colon was up front and honest with me. would definitely recommend this team. BIG thanks to Stacey she's definitely the GREATEST OF ALL TIMES. Any time I have questions she's on it and responds in a timely manor. ❤️❤️

Receptionist is a complete joke, thank God she answered the phone the way she did, made me reconsider having called right away. No professional skills whatsoever nor did she know what she was talking about at all. Must have been about 14 yrs. old. She told me they couldn't help with a support modification because it was out of state 😂 and that in case I didn't notice, they were located in Florida. Typical Puerto Rican
He helped and guided me in the most critical moment. Thank you, lawyer.

⚠️ CAUTION ⚠️
I hired Jorge Colon to litigate my family case.

During this time, I found Jorge Colon makes his own decisions when it comes to your case without running ANY explanations of what to expect or details by you.
You are walking in blind with this attorney. All of my evidence was handed to the opposing party before hearings. This gave the opposing party enough time to contact me to think up and make excuses for their behavior.

I have an invoice where I was charged for Jorge Colon's attempt to get in touch with my previous attorney without asking me after he told me during our consultation he doesn't need info from him. I protested the charge and paid my previous attorney to release info and to work with Jorge Colon. Jorge Colon then immediately withdraws from my case with the final hearing right around the corner and  LEFT ME WITHOUT REPRESENTATION.

After all the damage had been done and pre-trial statements were finished, I ask him if he could finish the case and he declines.

Looking through similar reviews here and in different sites, I now understand that this is usual for Jorge Colon and his office.

I DO NOT recommend this attorney.
A dead end try other law offices.

He says he's going to do all he wants to do is take your money not return your calls and not do anything for you that's our opinion
I would not recommend this guy for anybody if you're needed an attorney do not use this guy find another one that is our opinion
the Worst Lawyer in Florida. He tells you I have lunch with the judge, do not worry, you trust him, you give him the case and then he does not even answer very irresponsible call in his work
I highly recommend him 💯💯💯 a great lawyer 👍👍 thank you

Mr. Colon has handle several of workers compensation cases of mind and my experience with him has been awesome. He is up front and no BS, I recommend him to anyone eyes close.   Plus I consider him a friend.
A Typical Lawyer....

After two lawyers, exorbitant fees and back- room deals to settle before trial hiring Mr Colon was the best decision we made for our family in a custody case. His legal expertise and professionalism went above and beyond our expectations throughout the course of the case.
His whole approach together with his consideration and compassion went a long way during a most stressful ordeal but most of all he listened and he listened attentively and responded in a timely manner.
He and his team worked tirelessly to ensure the best possible outcome on our behalf.
We cannot thank you enough for your assistance, time, and effort and  wish you continued success in your practice. We would not hesitate to recommend you to any friends or family members looking for an experienced family attorney.

Very personable and professional! I have had the pleasure of getting to know Mr. Colon and his team, as my circumstances needed his attention for several years. In that time, I felt safe and secure knowing he was handling the situation and very impressed with his knowledge of the law. Thank you 🙏🏼 Mr. Colon and team. Highly recommend!!
Great help with my bankruptcy paperwork. Very patient and professional.

You need them before you meet them.
You meet them because you need them. 💪🏽
Mr. Finch is a caring and thoughtful man and I appreciate all he’s done for me. Thanks Dennis 👍🏻👍🏻
5 stars

Mr. Finch represented me several years ago. In a recent conversation his name came up. It made me remember how well I was represented. I was involved in a traffic accident when a couple ran a red-light and hit my car. Due to my age and driving record the cop chose to believe the older couple and  cited me! Dennis did enough research and was able to prove I was not at fault and the other couple was. The case was such a potential landslide upon the court date, nether the officer who wrote the citation nor the driver or passenger ( his wife) would even show up. This resulted in the case being dismissed and upon insurance arbitration I was found 100% not at fault. His dedication, experience, and resources proved to be worthwhile. I would highly recommend him! Thank you again Mr. Finch

The only thing positive thing we can say about our experience with Mr Finch is the interacrtion with his office assistant. In the beginning he sold us on being the best and the love he has for his clients. It was my wife's first accident and we didn't know where to turn. We didn't want so high profile lawyer and was referred to Dennis Finch.
The case took years to close and our interactions with him got worse over time. Returning our calls sometime took a week. The compassion he displayed to take the case isn't what he displayed through the case. The case drug on for years, only to get minimal results in the end. He did however make sure to get the maximum he could from the minimal settlement offer that he said was our best option. Once he received his money, he never returned a single call to us. We had stuff hit our credit in a negative way that was supposed to be taken care of through a letter of agreement. We were also supposed to receive money from overpayment of bills that were covered by the letter if agreement. None of which we ever received. He's money hungry and only cares until he see's what he thinks your value to him is.
We wouldn't even recommend Dennis Finch to someone we were trying to bring harm to...

Mr. Finch has assisted more the once and has done a amazing job each time.
Highly recommended
I'm not the easiest to work with but I brought business in and I was continuing my life when his service's ended.
Great firm, diligent and thorough in their work...
Top Law!
Good people and results
I worked with this firm in 2013 and 2014.  I found the partners to be exceptionally knowledgeable and skilled.  I highly recommend this firm.

I met with Jared and his team shortly after my accident. He was very knowledgeable about my rights and the entire process. My accident was in the end of May and we reached a settlement before the end of August. He made sure to reach out to me throughout the case and left me without questions. Very thorough, professional and organized. Would highly recommend reaching out if you have the need!

My husband and I contacted Mr. Gainey after I was referred to the law firm. We had an issue with our above the ground pool builders building a poorly constructed pool. They wouldn’t contact us to correct the problem. Anyway Mr Gainey explained in detail the pros and cons of possible outcomes in detail. He and his assistant Ms Linda were great in helping us to get a desired outcome. Luckily for us his demand letter which explained Florida statutes etc was enough to get the builder’s attention and we have our pool that’s so far still stable. I’m so thankful that helped and thankful for Mr Gainey and his team. If we have anything else we will call them again.

I am so thankful for the help I received from Courtney Durham. She stepped in after the initial final judgment and helped clear up a very stressful situation with my dad’s estate. From start to finish, Mrs. Durham was professional, knowledgeable, and extremely communicative, which made the entire process much easier to navigate. Her office staff was also helpful and responsive. I truly felt supported during a difficult time and would highly recommend Courtney Durham to anyone needing probate assistance.

Had to leave this review to let everyone reading, know that Dr. Durham has been excellent throughout my bankruptcy case, always going above and beyond and fighting until the end. Thank you Dr. Durham for all the hard work and dedication you put into my case, my family and I are truly grateful.

I was so nervous about hiring an attorney which Seniors vs Crimes had recommended.  So I called the referral no. they gave me and made an appointment with Ms Durham.  She was very knowledgeable about the state laws concerning incomplete construction work.  She explained what was the best result and the worst.   From that day on she built our case and waited for a settlement.  When it came, I was pleasantly surprised by the amount.   We were very pleased.  Thank you Ms. Durham for an exceptional job done quickly.  M Wyman

Courtney was very helpful,  informative,  and compassionate.  I greatly appreciate her assistance and time. She answered every question i had and didn't make me feel rushed. I would highly recommend this attorney. She really knows her stuff. THANK YOU!

Late review.  Should have done this a month ago.  I have to add to the great reviews here.  Ms Durham was not able to take our case due to logistics; we need to hire an out of state lawyer.  She gave us much more  time than she was required to, and showed a deep concern for our dilemma.  Highly recommend!

My professional experience with Ms. Courtney Durham was very Positive, and productive. She helped me with family concerns that needed legal mediation.  She helped solve my concerns in a speedy and professional manner. And gave me a substantial refund from my deposit. Her office staff was very courteous when I called. Ms. Durham returned my calls and emails promptly.  I would 100% hire her again. I am very pleased with her Services, and blessed to have known her on professional level.
She is absolutely amazing. Very nice. Very helpful. 10 out of 10 will recommend!
Courtney Durham, Esq. did a wonderful job of representing my husband's mother's estate. She kept things moving along and also kept us well informed. Thank you again, Ms Durham.
Ms. Durham is truly dedicated to her clients, and professional. She explained the process and was flexible when we needed her to be. Thank you Courtney.
Courtney Durham was knowledgeable and nice . She is the one you want when court gets put into play . I would recommender her in a second .

On all three of those cases, I never received any help, referrals, and dislike the lack of communication. It took my wife almost 7 months to recover. We have 4 children under 5 years of age and at the time a new born. I was forced to not work and take care of my family. Thanks for nothing. Oh the business now placed a warning sign at that area of injury.

reviews.text: Shannon Mulkey and her staff were always pleasant, efficient, knowledgeable, accessible and client focused. Shannon listens carefully to what you want and takes the time to explain things in terms that are understandable. I highly recommend her if you are planning to do your estate planning.

Hello, I was represented by you in Dec of 2020 and you took a sum of money from me. You said that there was no money in my fathers estate. Well this year I simply went onto Florida Treasure hunt and saw that there was around 13k and I filled out some paperwork and received the $ for my brother and I. I would like to get a refund from what I paid you. Let me know your thoughts. Not only did I lose money to you in a time of need there was money available that entire time.
Helped me every step of the way!

Professional, caring, efficient, relaxed atmosphere, knowledgeable... just a few adjectives to describe our experience with Attorney Mulkey and her team. The law is complex, and we felt at ease and satisfied with the work they did for us. We highly recommend Shannon Mulkey Law Firm for your estate plans.
Had an excellent experience with this attorney and team regarding estate matters. They were professional, answered our questions clearly and patiently, and communicated regularly and professionally.

I recently had an excellent experience with Shannon Mulkey Law Firm when handling matters of trusts, guardianships, and wills. Their professionalism and expertise in estate planning were evident, and they were incredibly patient and responsive to all my questions and concerns.
I was provided personalized and thoughtful guidance throughout the entire process, making complicated legal matters much more manageable.
I really felt they cared about getting everything just right for my family's needs. A big thank you to the entire team for their hard work and kindness.
I highly recommend Shannon Mulkey Law Firm for anyone needing expert assistance in these areas.

Shannon Mulkey's estate planning services are top-notch! She's got a knack for simplifying the legal jargon and making the whole process easy to understand. If you're looking for someone reliable and experienced to handle your estate planning needs, Shannon's your go-to lawyer!

Shannon and her team were amazing!!  We honestly had no idea where to begin with setting up a special needs trust and they were all so nice and accommodating.  They took as much time as we needed to ask questions and explain everything.  Communication was an A++ for sure, from the reminder calls for appointments to the quick response and emails, Shannon and her team were absolutely amazing. I would highly recommend them to anybody in need they go to attorney.
Hey 🤗 This Big Beautiful House Currently Being Used as A Law Firm.... is 115yrs. Young 💯🥰

Spoke to Holly who was very rude, spoke over me when I was trying to ask questions and also lied about the receipt of documents and appointment times. On Tuesday, April 16th I called to find out the status of the paperwork and was informed the attorney was not going to handle our case. Very unprofessional handling of the entire application and communication process.
I would not reccomend using this attorney, based on my interactions with her office staff.

I recently moved to Ocala and needed to update my will. I contacted the Shannon Mulkey Law Firm for assistance. The receptionist told me that I must first fill out a form with my personal  information. I dropped off the completed form at the Mulkey office and set up a future appointment. I called the law office on the morning of my appointment to be certain I had the correct time to stop by the office. "Oh, no", I was told, "This will be a phone interview." Well, I must say, I've had my will drawn up/updated by 3 other law offices in my life. Not one of them required the filling out of an application, in the first place. I simply called the law office, made an appointment with the attorney, SAT DOWN IN PERSON with the attorney to go over my existing will and describe any desired changes, then in two weeks or so returned to review my updated will.
Easy peasy! I have since updated my will through another law office. I'm sure that Ms. Mulkey is a skilled attorney, I really can't say. But why all the runaround to simply draw up a new will from an existing one?

Fill out an application? No face-to-face meeting at appointment time? Why?
I highly recommend her. She is very professional and amazingly wonderful at what she does. Shannon Mulkey Law Firm thank you for all you do!!!!

The moment I walked into Shannon's office, she made me feel like I had known her for years. Shannon is caring, professional but most of all an expert in her field of law. I will continue to refer my friends, family and  business  associates to Shannon Mulkey.
Shannon, you are a Gem!!

I have several active guardianship cases in which Shannon Mulkey represents me. Shannon and her staff are consummate professionals; correct, efficient and prompt. In the courtroom Shannon is astute and always well prepared. I highly recommend her.
Shannon provides a level of interest and care that enables her to handle all of the details associated with your case smoothly.  She made everything very easy for me and my partner.

If there were more stars this firm would exceed it! They're personable, they care they're very professional, their knowledge and willingness to help is second to none, I couldn't recommend this law firm more!
They helped me so much just on a first time consultation-
They didn't expect a payment, and I'm forever thankful-
Love this freaking firm I would definitely use them in the future without hesitation of their fees-
Love this freaking firm!

I never thought I would be leaving an excellent review for an attorney of any sort, much less a realestate attorney, but here it is. I had a very complicated situation with my home, a divorce, and a bankruptcy. I was worried that I was going to be out in the street because of some underhanded activities by my ex. I had no idea where to turn to resolve the issues and started to google attorney options. Of all the attorneys that I called, Ruben (for the offices of McMurray) was the only one who said they would be willing to help. He spent the better part of an hour explaining to me what my rights were and how everything worked. He let me ask every question that I had, and answered patiently and thoroughly. He made it easy to access his expertise, you simply had to type in your contact information on the website and schedule a time with him. He called exactly as scheduled. At the close of the call, I wanted to cry, I will not lose my home and I now know exactly what I need to do to protect myself and maintain a roof over my head. I was charged absolutely nothing for this consultation. Zero. You can be sure that if I need further services, I will absolutely call on the offices of McMurray. I would, without hesitation, recommend them to anyone who needs help with a realestate or bankruptcy matter.

Last year was a nightmare. I was left as a co owner of a house that had been trashed abandoned and behind in the mortgage. I cried begged pleaded but no help from Mr. Cooper the mortgage company.  A friend in CO researched lawyers in my area and gave me Justin McMurray office. I spoke with Ruben who calmed me, reassured me, and from day one went to work on my case. I felt safe and confident that it would be resolved. Within 3 months, they weeded out dishonest people around me, closed on my house and made sure things were done with my best interest at heart. They broke things down where I could understand while not making me feel stupid. For the first time in a year I could breathe. When I cried it was tears of joy though throughout the ordeal they heard my breakdowns without judgment.   My praise is to Mr. McMurray and Ruben Rodriguez,  I can never pay them enough for what they've done for me. They'll never know just how they guided me off the ledge. I will forever hold them at the highest esteem and recommend them to anyone needing help in their scope of business.
Mr. McMurray efficiently and proficiently managed the legal proceedings pertaining to my eviction, despite the challenging circumstances posed by the tenants involved. I highly suggest.
Good experience with the firm. Questions were answered almost right away. My case was handled in a timely manner with very good results.
After calling for two days and getting no return call, I'm forced to find someone else to help me.

My husband experienced two major medical emergencies in a two year period and we suddenly found ourselves in financial trouble. I was an emotional wreck when I contacted Justin McMurray's office. I worked directly with Christina Lupoli who was so very kind and helpful.  She kept me posted as the proceedings occurred, and was always helpful when I would call for something. I would recommend these folks to anyone.

Justin was great. Christina Lupoli was awesome. She made an intimidating process disappear with professionalism and compassion for everything I was going through. If you need a bankruptcy attorney I highly recommend Justin and his staff.

I recently hired  Brian Laird   an attorney who, unfortunately, proved to be highly unprofessional and utterly incompetent. Not only did the attorney fail to deliver on their promise, but they also showed a complete disregard for professionalism by resorting to the use of foul language during our interactions.

From the outset, it was apparent that this attorney did not possess the necessary skills and knowledge required for my case. Their lack of attention to detail was evident in the numerous mistakes made throughout the legal proceedings. Important deadlines were missed, crucial documents were mishandled, and the attorney's overall preparation was subpar.

What truly shocked me, however, was the attorney's unprofessional conduct during our conversations. Instead of maintaining a respectful and dignified demeanor, they would frequently resort to using foul language. This unprofessional behavior not only displayed a lack of respect for me as their client, but it also tarnished the overall perception of the legal profession.

Aside from their incompetence and lack of professionalism, the attorney also failed to communicate effectively. They rarely returned my calls or emails promptly, leaving me in a state of constant anxiety and uncertainty about the progress of my case. Additionally, when I did manage to speak with them, their responses were often vague and lacking the necessary depth and legal insight.

Given the exorbitant fees charged by this attorney, it is deeply disappointing to have received such a below-par level of service. I would strongly advise anyone considering their services to look elsewhere for legal representation. It is evident that this attorney lacks the skills, professionalism, and respect required to meet the needs of their clients.

In conclusion, my experience with this attorney was highly unsatisfactory. Their lack of competence, combined with their frequent use of foul language, created a toxic and unproductive environment. As a result, I do not recommend this attorney to anyone seeking legal assistance. It is crucial to choose an attorney who demonstrates the utmost professionalism, competency, and respect for their clients.

reviews.text:
Update: I want to clarify the facts in response to Victor Musleh’s public reply.
1. Direct Contact via Facebook: Before posting his public response, Victor J. Musleh personally contacted me via Facebook, attempting to pressure me to remove my review. He falsely claimed that I never spoke with attorney Kelly Musleh, despite the fact that I did speak directly with Kelly, who dismissed my request for a second opinion after very clearly identifying herself on the phone as KELLY.
2. Misrepresentation of Ethics Rules: Victor Musleh cited Rule 4-4.2 of the Florida Rules of Professional Conduct to justify refusing my request. This rule is intended to prevent attorneys from interfering with a client’s existing legal representation. However, seeking a second opinion is a lawful right and does not constitute interference. His use of the rule to dismiss me and avoid providing guidance is/was misleading and incorrect.
3. Pattern of Unprofessional Conduct: His actions — both via private Facebook messages and public reply — constitute an attempt to intimidate and gaslight me into removing a truthful review, while misrepresenting the law and my communications with his firm.

My review is entirely factual and accurately reflects my experience attempting to obtain guidance from their firm. This update is to correct misrepresentations in Victor Musleh’s response and clarify the truth for anyone reading.

————————————————————————

I recently called Musleh Law Firm seeking a second opinion on my personal injury case. I explained that I already had an attorney but was uncomfortable with how they were handling the case and was looking for a second opinion. I have every right as a client to seek a new attorney if I feel my current one isn’t representing me the way I need.

However, instead of listening to my concerns or explaining how they could potentially step in, I was immediately told that they “couldn’t touch the case” if I had signed a contract with another attorney. That statement is not accurate under Florida law. Clients always have the right to terminate representation and hire a new attorney at any time. The original attorney may assert a lien for fees or costs related to the work they’ve already done, but that is handled between the attorneys and comes out of the recovery—not out of the client’s pocket separately.

It is frustrating to be dismissed so quickly when I was looking for clarity and considering switching firms because I don’t feel protected or properly represented where I am. A more professional and accurate response would have been to explain the process (including how liens work) and give me the information I needed to make an informed decision.

Kelly specifically is not a helpful attorney to reach out to if you’re looking for someone to actually help you out of a bad situation with another failing attorney ✨along with✨ a personal injury case.

For anyone else in my position: don’t let a firm tell you that you are stuck if you’ve signed a contingency fee contract. Under Florida law, clients always maintain the right to change attorneys if they’re not comfortable with their representation.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Notwithstanding your unfounded criticism, I am bound by the ethics rules to limit my response to that contained in your review. The Musleh Law Firm places ethics and attorney/client privilege above our personal profit. It appears that you are unhappy with your current “failing” law firm (not us).

You are correct that you have the absolute right to terminate your current law firm and hire a new one. We never told you otherwise. However, when you contacted our office, you were still represented by another firm. Even in this day and age of cutthroat TV commercials with all the law firms claiming they are the biggest and the best, The Musleh law Firm respects the relationship another attorney has established with his/her client. Therefore, our policy is to strictly comply with Rule of Professional Conduct 4-4.2 which sates in part, “In representing a client, a lawyer must not communicate about the subject of the representation with a person the lawyer knows to be represented by another lawyer in the matter, unless the lawyer has the consent of the other lawyer.”

Your review disparages my law partner, Kelly Musleh. However, to be extremely clear, you never spoke with Kelly Musleh. You spoke with my assistant whose response was proper and in accordance with the Rules of Professional Conduct. She referred you back to your current lawyer. Kelly Musleh is the most conscientious lawyer I know and cares deeply about our clients.

Your review is unfair. You are very dissatisfied with your current law firm which you fail to identify in any review, yet you don’t hesitate to disparage our firm (which has never represented you) with a 1-star review. Our only failure was to follow the ethics rules. Ms. Scripter, I would submit that your criticism is very misplaced and the review should be removed.

On a personal note, we wish you the best with your case.

Victor J. Musleh Jr.

I submitted a request for a consultation back in June but never received a response. After leaving a review about their lack of communication, I was contacted and offered a free consultation in exchange for removing the review. The consultation itself was unhelpful—McGraw refused to answer specific questions, told me I didn’t need legal help for my case, and then ignored follow-up emails requesting clarification on matters discussed during the consult. Ultimately, his dismissive advice regarding my landlord dispute was not only unhelpful but also harmed my ability to handle the case effectively.

I had a disappointing experience with the woman answering the phone at extension 1 (McGraw). I had spoken with someone from the office two days earlier who said I’d receive a follow-up call, but after hearing nothing, I followed up myself. When I called back, I was met with a dismissive tone from the woman who answered. After briefly explaining my situation, I was abruptly told, “We don’t do that,” with no attempt at further assistance. She did provide the Florida Bar’s phone number, which I appreciated, but the call ended with her hanging up on me as I was saying “thank you.” Very unprofessional and inconsiderate.

People of Ocala - my wife and I finally got around to signing our updated wills (and important ancillary documents) earlier this week (February 2025).

While not the most exciting process, Samantha Rauba was incredibly knowledgeable and helpful and took time to walk us through the entire deal.

There are a lot of questions to consider and important decisions to be made and she guided us through and made sure to explain exactly what all those fancy Latin words meant and what exactly we were signing off on.

If you need that sort of thing done for the first time or if you need to update one that's out of date, I would encourage you to give her office a call and get an appointment set up.

I just closed my 1st loan with MRM Attorneys at Law. I am loving them and especially Samantha Melendez. Closing loans can be complicated and finding a title company that can keep up in this fast changing environment can be difficult. They were quick, responsive and problem solvers AND when I got an email from Samantha that said to close on time  "I need the loan package 3 hours prior to closing" and NOT 3 days, I was sold. They get it! As an attorney owned title company that can also represent buyers and sellers and prepare or review contracts.

*** Buyers Beware *** It took me months to gather my thoughts as to not review this Law Firm hastily. I attempted to resolve this with the Attorney's Office, Realtor and Sellers. Sorry, this review is not short.  At the end of September of 2023, my husband and I closed on our first home together.  This is just a little 900 sq ft fixer upper to live out our lives in.
You hope and pray that when you buy a home that a Lawyer's Ethical and Moral Code is beyond reproach.  Not with this Attorney (Mutarelli), or the closing associate (Samantha). In my Closing documents I was responsible for  for the last 3 months of the year, and the Sellers were to pay the 9 months prior.  This is in my closing documents in "Black and White".  The issue was the "Assessed Taxes".  They were not disclosed to us at closing even though the Tax Office when I went in to file Homestead Exemption informed me that Trim Notices were sent out to the Sellers and apparently is "Public" Knowledge,  Something that a line of Attorneys, Title Companies, and Realtors would have known and had "Experience"  in since this is nothing new in any closing.  Just to catch you up (Buyers beware) The taxes at closing were assessed at the prior year $ 482.11. not the 2023 taxes when we actually closed. That meant my taxes for 2023 that I should only have been responsible for  jumped from (3) months of the $482.11 owed to $2,555.32 when I went in to file Homestead Exemption.  Not *One single person is owning up to this nor taking responsibility as I hate to say it, the little guy remains the underdog. To avoid further penalties, we were forced to pay these taxes, and my only step is not in my budget.  This is a very hard lesson for a simple blue collar worker to accept.  I guess my moral compass is one of hard work, honesty, and always "Integrity" in all things.  No, Life is not fair, and that I can live with, but "Ethical Behavior and "Accountability for what is right in the one thing I have always held most closely to how a person should live their life.

I cannot recommend the Martinez Manglardi law firm enough. After my accident I was shaken up pretty bad and did not plan to get an attorney. After seeing the damage to my car and hearing the issues I was having with my back and shoulders, my friend convinced me to contact Victoria Manglardi. I am SO thankful I did. She made sure ALL of my medical/future medical was taken care of, and she and her staff helped me with about a million rental car problems I had with the insurance company. She also took care of the issues I had when my car was not fixed properly.  Without her I would have been without a car for MONTHS.

Victoria’s communication skills are on point (always important when an attorney is handling your case). Whenever I reached out, I always had a response within the day. They attorneys and paralegals at this firm care about their clients and do everything possible to take the stress out of the anxiety that accompanies a car crash. And they secured me a nice settlement, which I absolutely would not have received without their dedication and hard work.

If you need an attorney, call them. You absolutely won’t regret it. Thank you, Victoria!!!!!!  And please thank your office as well!!!

His confident words freed me from fear and despair and gave me the courage to proceed. He was simply amazing. God bless Herb Williams!
Reverend June Schmidt

The true test in a bankruptcy attorney and how he has handled your bankruptcy is in the many years to follow.  Mr. Williams was very nice and helped a recently divorced mom of many children. BUT, after 17 years, my bankruptcy has come back to haunt me.  My attorney advised me to "reaffirm"  a mortgage that my ex-husband and I  had allowed a buyer to assume on a home we sold.  Now that owner, of the home I sold over 17 years ago, has stopped paying the mortgage and it is on my credit as a "foreclosure" .  I don't own the home!  After talking to many attorneys for advice, they have all asked me: "Why didn't your bankruptcy attorney include this in your bankruptcy?"   "He was not looking out for your interests".  Over and over again I hear the same thing.  If you decide to go through the process of a bankruptcy, go for the jugular, clear everything off your name and don't hire "a nice guy".  The ONLY reason I'm posting this is that I have saved thousands of dollars by reading people's posts by steering clear of certain services.

J. Herbert Williams has over 20+ years experience in Ocala, Florida as a Bankruptcy Attorney.

If you are experiencing financial difficulties, Herb provides Free Consultation. I highly recommend his services.

reviews.text: $100 for a 30 min consultation. I shouldn't have to pay $100 just to ask you if you can take my case.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your feedback. I understand your concern about the consultation fee.

As a law firm, we charge for our professional legal services as we are not a free legal clinic. Our 30-minute consultations provide a thorough case evaluation and legal strategy based on your specific situation. You're receiving professional legal analysis and honest guidance about your options which is the same expertise we apply to every case we handle.

This ensures we can give your matter the focused attention it deserves rather than brief phone screenings. Many clients find value in understanding their legal position and options, even before deciding whether to retain counsel.

We understand this approach isn't for everyone, and we respect that different firms structure consultations differently. We wish you the best with your case.

Extremely unprofessional and disrespectful experience. I called to ask whether this law firm handles civil cases. The staff member said yes and asked what the issue was. As I began explaining my situation, she intentionally hung up on me.

I immediately called back and asked for her name. She said her name was Melidy and spoke to me in a very rude and dismissive tone. Refused to tell me the last name. When I told her I wanted to file a complaint about her behavior, she responded with attitude and said I would have to pay $50 just to register before speaking to an attorney, then ended the conversation…. lol lol thank you

I posted on star as Google doesn't give the option of minus 0. This is one of the WORST law firms I've ever encountered.  Let's start with the smaller issues before advancing to the unlawful. Phone calls unanswered, then double billed.  I would ask a question, no response for days, then call back reiterating the exact same  question.  Changed $40 for call number one and another $40 for call number 2. Failure to comply with request for subpoena's to SECO. Those subpoenas were important to my case as they would reflect fraud and perjury of the opposition.  Plappert completely ignored my request speaking of it weeks later after the opposition filed for Chapter 11. Plapperts response was that the case has been dismissed on account of the opponent filing chapter 11. Yet I made that request weeks prior. Then there's the mediation.  I told Plappert I spoke to the opposition and he stated he absolutely didn't want to attend the mediation. Did Plappert get confirmation from the opponent that he wasn't attending? NO. Did Plappert inform the Judge no mediation and the reason? No. But Plappert did in fact

I can’t recommend the Florida Legal Advocacy Group highly enough—they truly turned what could have been a nightmare into a smooth, stress-free process. When my father passed away, I was overwhelmed navigating the probate for his property transfer, with no idea where to start. From the first consultation, attorneys Caleb Smith and Kathryn Mack were absolute lifesavers. Their expertise in probate law shone through every step, explaining complex legal jargon in plain English so I always felt informed and empowered.
Caleb’s sharp attention to detail caught potential pitfalls I never would have spotted, while Kathryn’s warm, empathetic approach made the emotional side of things so much easier to bear. They were incredibly responsive—emails answered within hours, calls returned promptly—and kept everything on track without unnecessary delays or hidden fees. Their professionalism, combined with genuine care, made all the difference during such a tough time.
If you’re dealing with estate matters, trust me, FLAG is the team you want in your corner. Grateful beyond words—thank you, Caleb and Kathryn! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Forever grateful for Attorney Stanley Plappert Abby and Dakota as well.  They worked tirelessly to get justice for us on a PI case. Our calls and emails were always answered / returned in a timely manner. I always felt involved and aware of the steps that were being taken to get justice. Attorney Plappert is fair and KNOWS the laws, having him in your corner will take all of your worries away. Abby will work tirelessly to communicate with the insurance companies and the doctors to get you the best outcome for your case. Dakota was professional and prepared -I had no worries being in company of a true professional. Thank you Florida Legal Advocacy Group for fighting for what was right , and handling our case with grace and compassion!

5 stars to Attorney Melissa Thibeault for allowing me a peace of mind finally! It has almost been a year since the death of my children’s father and to have to fight an individual with no legal rights to my children over MY CHILDREN has caused me major anxiety to say the least. I tried resolving this case on my own but quickly realized I needed a legal professional for my case. I thank GOD for placing Melissa in my path. She’s knowledgeable, professional and a calm spirited person and she fought for me and the outcome was definitely in my favor and I appreciate that more than she will ever know. Melissa kept me informed every step of the way, gave me assurance and did not allow me to settle in my case for just anything. To say the least my children and I can FINALLY move forward in our lives TOGETHER without the anxiety and it feels so good for all of this to finally be over! Thank you GOD and thank you Melissa!

Daniel was my attorney and helped me achieve my desired result.  Jessica was very helpful and communicative but did not come in until later in the process.  Daniel was very good about getting back to me with emails and phone calls, something which I hear attorneys are not good at doing!  Hopefully I’ll never need an attorney again but would use them again!  Double check the subtraction in your invoices as I found multiple errors in subtraction on statements, always in favor of the law firm!

Melissa Thibeault was an outstanding lawyer. She is skilled, dedicated, and went the extra mile for my case. She won my case and justice prevailed!
I can’t say enough about what a great lawyer she is.
Top notch professional. Very attentive, informative and practical. Highly recommend.
Liked the attorneys, but I couldn't afford them.

I’m a low income senior on disability. I thought an “advocacy” group would care more about advocating for people who need it, not telling them “sure we will help if you give us thousands of dollars”. That’s not advocacy, that’s greed!

I am so thankful for the attorneys that helped us during a very frustrating legal case . Smith , Raymer , the front desk were very professional and easy to work with. Even when I did not understand the process they were their to explain the process at every step. They always answered the phone and talked to us which is a rarity these days! I am shocked that some people would think they were rude and did not help them . The legal process can be very cumbersome and confusing at times but that is where the lawyer takes over because they know the process even if you do not or understand it. Thank you for the help we received , I would most definitely use them again if the need arises. Ty

I emailed attorney hoping we could get refunded remaining balance because the time case was worked on was only one week, but parent's signed non-refundable agreement and refund did not happen.  Caleb responded and said owner of firm approved $1,500 credit towards opening probate.  But then my parents received bill/invoice in mail from accounting department of law office stating my parents owed more money, approximately $300.00 and handwritten statement stating credit approximately $5,340.00. I found this very unprofessional and incompetent, but proof remaining balance. Which I knew was there because of case only worked on for one week.  I believe Caleb would have granted/provided refund exception. But that owner who practices too, in my opinion, is GREEDY. result of those actions.

Melissa Thineault is a committed and caring attorney and person. Family Law cases are emotional and extremely difficult when children are involved. Father’s rights across the country is challenging if you don’t know the laws and have someone walking you through the best way to advocate for yourself.  Also this case changed from parents living in the same county to one parent moving halfway across the country.

In a difficult child custody case that was ongoing over a year Melissa established paternity, got a protective order, got a order to prevent removal of the 2yr old from the jurisdiction of the court to ensure the child wasn’t taken from the state and out of reach, fought through two mediations and multiple times before the judge on differences and finally winning the final custody trial.  A win is a success but dad winning in a custody trial is a battle with ups and downs and many different unknowns and emotions. Melissa was great in every aspect and also managed all the family emotions that go with this and kept us thinking positive and helped us to make the right decisions while guiding dad and family on practical and appropriate living to get the best outcome. Often families believe they are doing what is best but if you’ve never been through this before you really have no idea on the process and the court’s expectations. It is important to have someone in your corner who can navigate this for you and protect you along the way.

These outcomes change your life and your child’s life so make sure you have someone in your corner that understands that.

In a moment of panic, the FLAG staff was so professional and very expedient in processing my legal request. To my surprise, I thought it would have taken months, but with FLAG it was a lot less. FLAG definitely have my HIGH FIVE!

I'm extremely disappointed with this law firm and my attorney. Now, I do have a record and I did get arrested for another felony charge. However, I am unwell physically and they took advantage of my unwell frame of mind during my detoxification period not to mention the traumatic arrest and treatment by Hernando county sherriffs. I called the firm and explained very thoroughly my charges from the past, what happened and why I was arrested. Without hesitation the attorney I spoke to says to me "we can get your charges dropped"
I have only had a public defender before my experience with Smith and Eulo. I'm not knowledgeable with court procedures or terminology at all.  I was given the choice to choose between two attorneys unfortunately I picked Ms. Root. She barely spoke to me about my choices barely kept me in the loop. I went from having my promises of having my charges dropped (which now in my sober frame of mind is just absolutely wild, which is why I feel taken advantage of). I was able to avoid a prison sentence however I'm on 4 years supervision with a buttload of terms and when it's all said and done this will have cost me 10 grand and over four years of my life. I don't believe ms.root even tried to talk them down on the terms, I believe she wanted to wrap up my case as quickly as possible seeing as i only had two court dates with her. I feel I couldve gotten this same deal with a PO and saved $3,500. However maybe not, I would've at least like if promises weren't made that couldn't be kept.

reviews.text:
I was rear ended while stopped at a red light. This was the first accident I had ever been in. I was terrified and I had no idea what to do. I called Farrah and Farrah and I was contacted right away by an actual attorney. Camille Concannon introduced herself and the team that would be working on my case. She made this terrible experience less scary. Anytime I had a question I would text my legal team and she would get back to me in a very reasonable time. She made me feel  as if I was her only client.  She was so understanding and put all the legal terms into language that I could understand. I highly highly highly recommend Farrah and Farrah and Camille Concannon if you are facing a situation like a car accident. You will talk to the actual lawyer not just someone who answers a 1-800 phone number.
Thank you Farrah and Farrah and especially Camille for all your hard work and due diligence with my case.  I hope I never get into another accident, but if I do I will
DEFINITELY be calling them.

reviews.text: Hired F&F this summer after a bad accident left my car near-totaled. They were very transparent from the beginning and their retainer explained the cut schedule so I knew exactly how much of my recovered funds would go to lawyer fees. No surprise fees. Open communications. Very direct with their isntructions. They were also regularly in contact and always available. Angie was my case manager the whole time and she lived up to her name, being the angel of a guide that she was. She was always a [reasonable] phone call or text away in case I had questions. When I got my payout, it was very close as she had estimated. She was also very helpful in providing a timeliness of the process. The accident occurred in May and I signed the release of bodily injury in November this year. Moreover, she even helped me review a release form for my new car's depreciated value at no cost. I was able to independently pursue additional property damages from the insurance company after my new car's value dropped significantly following this accident.

reviews.text: Things haven't been easy the last couple of years. Chalkley Law was the best thing that ever happened to me and my family. I got angry and some how landed Tracy. This lady put me at ease. Explained to me what Mr. Chalkley could do for me. We spoke for a good 30 minutes. It was very comforting. I then decided this was the kind of law firm I needed. We signed with them and from there on the hole firm has been like family to me. Always updating me on the case, responding to my emails within an hour, and sending me letters. This was such an easy process. If I had to do it again, I would never look anywhere else. Chalkley law firm is family and I would highly recommend them. Thank you so much Mrs. Tracy and Mr. Chalkley and everyone else who assisted in my needs ❤️.

It's not an easy process and it didn't happen over night,  but Atty Chalkley and his team got me approved! Not only approved but back dated 2 years!! He worked so hard for me! THANK YOU  to you Atty Chalkley and your incredible staff! I will always be grateful for you! Love you all! Erica

I called asking if they could help me with my SSI  and disability benefits because they amount was being lowered . The receptionist refused to make me an appointment because I am already receiving benefits and they only help people obtain benefits and that I should call SSI instead and speak with them directly. I asked if they advocate for their clients to get the most out of their benefits or if they do not care the amount their clients receive and only deal with obtaining said benefits and nothing else. She replied with "yes of course but you are not a client." I found this to be very rude and unprofessional. She made me feel like a nuisance and not a potential new client. I then asked that if I needed an advocate to work on my behalf because I felt the system was treating me unfairly who should I contact. She provided no useful information and suggested call the Florida bar and asking them for a referral. I find it hard to believe that a law firm that works in the field of disability and social security law would not know of any attorneys who would help someone navigate that system when that is what they purports to do but only for their own clients. Apparently they are not in the business of getting any more clients. Overall I feel that if my experience with their receptionist is any indication this firm is not a good faith advocate for the disabled and those eligible for social security. At most they will get you through the process and once you are accepted they will no longer provide any assistance whatsoever. Anyone who is familiar with the system know that just being accepted is only the start and that it is a continuous battle to maintain your benefits as the system will attempt to reduce your benefits and the first opportunity whether you feel it is justified or not. Bottom line if you need assistance getting the benefits you deserve and navigating the system, this firm will NOT ADVOCATE FOR YOU!!!

reviews.text: I have been suffering with SI joint pain and hypermobility in the surrounding ligaments since May of 2024. My chiropractor in NY suggested I seek out Prolotherapy. As soon as we arrived at our winter home, I immediately searched for Prolotherapy and was pleased to find Integrative Healthcare RegenU in Ocala. Dr. Bare and Dr Melanie did a wonderful examination. They explained everything and came up with a treatment plan of 3 Prolotherapy sessions in the ligaments, and one PRP session in the SI joint itself. I have completed the 3 Prolotherapy sessions and I am 90% pain-free. I am looking forward to the PRP in January. I am so grateful. The staff are all wonderful.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jane we are so elated that you are having such great success in such a short amount of time.  We are blessed to have you as a patient and we are eager for more success with the PRP treatments as well.  The team and I at Integrative healthcare RegenU are very happy that your suffering has ended. The best is yet to come!  Sincerely, Dr Bare,  Dr Melanie and the entire team.

HE HELPED SAVE ME HE HAD THE DA DROP ALL THE CHARGES OFF OF ME. I NEVER DID ANYTHING THE OP ACCUSED ME OF ON A DV. HE IS SO AMAZING.
Don't waste your money.

Mr  Holloman was my pro Bono lawyer that was appointed to my case because I wasn't able to be represented by the public defender office in Marion County, Fl. I was charged with 13 Felony Charges that I had already confessed to the States Attorney that I was completely and truly 100% guilty. I was facing a mandatory sentence of 100+ years. Imagine the emotional affect and shock I felt when Mr. Holloman was able to obtain a recorded sentence of only 3 years PROBATION!!!! AND ADJUDICATION WITHHELD!!! In my eyes this man saved my life and my freedom and he did it all without receiving a single cent from me. I can testify to the complete and total passion and integrity that this man possess. My life was completely over at the young age of 19. I was going to die in the Florida State Department of Corrections Gaston Women's Facility. My life was over before it began but this flesh and blood angel gifted to me by the heavens itself saved me and gifted me a 2nd chance. I consider him as a superhero for how he was able to get me a slap on the wrist when I was fully expected to be buried under the prison. I went into court that day fully expecting and slowly coming to terms with what my new life was going to be as a prisoner for the next 56 years that i was convinced I would be receiving that day instead Mr. Holloman performed something glorious and altogether miraculous. I walked free that day with only 3 YEARS PROBATION!!! I CANNOT STRESS ENOUGH HOW AMAZING THAT SENTENCE IS FOR 13 FELONY CHARGES. HE saved my life that day. And gave me a future. This was in 2004 when I was 18yo. I'm now 36 yo and I think about h everyday thanking him silently to myself and truly appreciate that my life wasn't over before it even began. My entire life is the complete opposite of what it would had been had he not had been such a wonderful person and my lawyer. It was truly an act of luck that he was appointed to my case by the fates. I know in my heart that if not for him I would be in Gaston prison still to this day. I'm truly thankful I had his representation, if it had been anyone else I wouldn't not be who or where I am today. He completely changed the course and outcome of my life. Such a good person and a truly great lawyer. And my personal real life superhero
He does a great job

reviews.text:
I started with this firm to get help with filing for Social Security disability…
Most importantly…you will not deal with Miss Henry at all. Even if you have direct questions for her, she will not return your call. You will be directed to Tina.
Secondly, you deal with her assistant Tina, which is rude, and doesn’t ever have an answer and will always have to call you back.
(that’s concerning in itself considering the role she’s in) then when you call back to follow up… (because Tina doesn’t return calls)you really get the attitude from the secretary.
My personal feeling..I was not ever welcomed when I called or had to go into the office from the staff. they would just ask what can I help you with?
I felt uncomfortable as a man working with this firm..the staff at this firm seems very delicate and sensitive.. if you have any questions about the disability process( for  some of us, we’ve never been through this, so we have questions) this firm seems to be too busy to help you answer questions or spend any time with you..

lastly, and I feel most importantly.
when I finally got my court hearing, I had an attorney that I’ve never talked to, never dealt with or worked with in the past..when talking to the judge. The attorney had none of the information ready and available that the judge asked for. I had to personally look it up myself through my notes while talking to the judge, while the attorney just sat there, I had to ask the attorney to help me get the information The judge asked for. The The attorney that Miss HENRY assigned to my case was was not able to find the information in a timely manner so the judge just moved on..
thankfully my case/disability were strong enough I didn’t need any additional information from the attorney to get my approval.
In closing, I called a couple of times to talk with Miss HENRY about my poor experience with her firm… her secretary took messages and  I have not heard back from anyone
nearly a year later… it’s not a coincidence it’s the service that you will receive from this firm.. it’s not personal it’s just making money.
This firm is obviously not customer focused just money driven..
I want to point out that the queen joker can respond to a review in less than a day but can’t respond to her clients 10 messages to return a call…..that validates my review even further. Show me the money!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your experience. I’m truly sorry we didn’t provide the level of communication and support you deserved. We will review the concerns you raised so we can improve. I’m grateful your claim was approved, and I appreciate your feedback. We wish you the very best.

reviews.text:
I had the same experience as Lorrie Jenkins, when I initially called I spoke with CJ. She was extremely insightful in explaining what I needed to do because I already had my hearing and was told that I was being denied. So I needed to wait for the denial letter so she could determine if we had a shot at winning the appeal.  About 8 months later I finally hear from SSA that the ALJ that was over my case passed away and that my case was going before a different judge. So I contacted CJ Henry Law Firm to give them the update on my case.

This time I spoke with Archie and at first he was extremely helpful with explaining to me what I needed to do to get prepared for the case. Then I received the contract from them, and it noted that I would have to pay 250.00 for medical records and that if I loss the case I could potentially be held responsible for owing other court fees and also lawyer fees. So I tried to contact Archie on several occasions to get an understanding but he never responded to my text messages. When I called, the receptionist said she "thinks I will be fine" but I wasn't ok with that, I needed to hear it from Archie or CJ. After reaching out a fourth time without any response I was over it.

So I decided not to go with them, I actually had my hearing before a ALJ again but this time I won!!! It was stressful doing it alone but I got through it with the Lords help.

Do better Archie.
reviews.ownerResponse: Congratulations on winning your claim. We appreciate your feedback. We'll use this to insight to better our process.

reviews.text:
You might find yourself in an impossible situation that threatens every aspect of your livelihood and your loved ones. While I wish otherwise, situations that demand aggressive and passionate advocacy are indiscriminate to us. If you find yourself in such a situation, questioning how you will overcome an institutional threat, you need someone who will fight for the love of the game. That person is Bobby Rumalla.

I was facing charges that would have ruined my life permanently, as the law was not equipped to handle fringe factors. It was a felony and a misdemeanor. Other attorneys across the state assessed my odds as very slim, with mandatory time and other permanent consequences. They were all well-ranked and could handle the gravity of this case. Attorney Rumalla was also honest about my odds and wasn’t the most comforting person. However, he was realistic. Everyone else was focused on trying to comfort me, but Atty. Rumalla actually comforted me by letting me hear what I needed to hear. My conversations with him were crucial in helping me mentally prepare for the daunting task of advocating for my exoneration. Throughout the process, I received updates that frankly terrified me. My situation consumed me with the fear of not making it out. However, Attorney Rumalla was working diligently, and charges were dropped within a month. The kind of outcome for my charges was almost unheard of, with only a handful of cases with similar outcomes in the last decade.

There is one singular truth that I had to accept immediately if you want to make it out of an impossible situation: You cannot trust institutions investigating you to assume your innocence alone. A public defender would be overwhelmed with a case load and would likely only push for the most expedient solution. It’s a privilege to even pay for effective representation, but if you have it, listen closely.

When choosing a criminal defense attorney, you must ask yourself, “Who can I trust with my life?” I sought someone intimately familiar with the local justice system’s workings and politics. Any big law firm might lack the respect of their peers in Marion County, which I recognized. I placed my faith in Bobby Rumalla.

Regarding payment, he offered the most flexible plan among the few attorneys I consulted, which was a lifesaver. It restored my humanity and dignity, allowing me to try and live my life while awaiting the next court date. This was a significant matter for my family, and I can’t express my gratitude for Atty. Rumalla enough. In contrast, others quoted me $60–80K with a 60% upfront deposit, which was unreasonable.

In my opinion, Bobby Rumalla fought and exonerated me not because of his empathy for me, but because of the fundamental principles of the law and the rights of all of us to effective representation. You’ll likely read negative reviews from any lawyer (including him), but you must consider your case’s specifics. You need to understand the institution’s potential against you and how to counter it. You need an effective strategist.

This means facing unpleasant truths.

It’s not my desire (or anyone who left a review) to seek criminal defense representation. However, that reality doesn’t exist for everyone. You’ll need someone to help you navigate the hellish justice system. This exoneration didn’t resolve the other struggles I still face, nor is that Atty. Rumalla’s responsibility. But I still have a chance at life, free. I can’t emphasize enough that, regardless of my personal circumstances, an arrest without conviction makes it nearly impossible to secure a conviction, let alone incarceration. This allowed me to focus on myself, heal, and thrive.

I never wish to be in this situation again, but if it happened to my loved ones, I’d call Bobby. I (still) fully trust him with my life.

We can’t thank Mr. Bobby Rumallah Esq. enough for what he did for our dear friend. He has been through so much already with the loss of his business and the unimaginable pain of losing his young daughter to COVID-19. On top of that, he was labeled a habitual offender after being stopped over seven times for driving on a suspended license. He wasn’t out causing trouble. He was just trying to keep working and survive the best way he knew how.

He was facing a felony conviction and more than a year in jail. Although the charges were reduced, he was still looking at serious jail time. That’s when Mr. Rumallah stepped in like a true hero. He took the case with compassion, urgency, and unmatched legal skill. Because of his dedication and expertise, our friend went from facing a year and a day in jail to just 10 days or probation.

Mr. Rumallah changed the course of our friend’s life. He is no longer driving and gets a second chance at life. His AV Preeminent rating is a reflection of the highest level of legal excellence, and after working with him, we know without a doubt that he deserves it!! Thank you, Sir.

Ps- He never asked for this review.
